ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( OR( ISPICKVAL( Type , "Webinar - External"), ISPICKVAL( Type , "External Event"), ISPICKVAL( Type , "Owned Event" ), ISPICKVAL( Type , "Webinar"), ISPICKVAL( Type , "Conference"), ISPICKVAL( Type , "Customer Event") ),
OR( ISBLANK(Salesloft_Cadence_Link__c ), ISBLANK(EndDate) ),
$Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", $Profile.Name <> "Integration User" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: "End Date" and "Salesloft Cadence link" are mandatory for this Campaign Type.
